title: pi-assert configuration
description: Schema for .pi/asserts.json — shell-assertion guard configuration for pi.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion and validation.

local.description: User-defined assertions and presets. Removable via the /asserts UI.

oneOf.description: A shell-based assert: `shell` (and optional `filter`/`when`) run on a hook.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this assert guards. Required.

hook.description: Pi event name to intercept. 'tool_call' fires before each tool executes; 'tool_result' fires after a tool runs (can patch the result); 'agent_end' fires when the agent finishes a prompt and goes idle.

filter.description: Key-value filter matched against { toolName, ...event.input }. If every key matches, the assert fires. Omitted → fires on every tool call. Each value may be a scalar (strict === match) or an array — an array means 'any of' its elements match the candidate value (e.g. { "toolName": ["write", "edit"] } runs on either). An empty array matches nothing.

anyOf.description: Array of scalars; candidate value matches if it === any element (any-of).

shell.description: Shell command whose exit code decides pass/fail. Exit 0 → allow; non-zero → block (or trigger a new turn, for agent_end). Pipes, redirects, &&, || all work.

when.description: Optional precondition shell command. The main shell only runs when this exits 0. Use for dynamic runtime conditions (dirty git state, file existence, etc.) that filter cannot express.

default.description: If true, this assert is active by default for new sessions. Defaults to false.

preset.description: Mutual exclusivity: a shell assert must not carry `preset` (use a preset entry instead).

oneOf.description: A preset: a named bundle of `source/name` refs expanded by activeList(). Presets and shell asserts are mutually exclusive.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this preset guards. Required.

preset.description: Qualified "source/name" refs (local/name or owner/repo/name) expanded to their shell asserts when the preset is active. Empty array is valid. Ref shape is enforced at write time by validatePresetShape (REF_RE).

default.description: If true, this preset is active by default for new sessions (activating the preset, not its members' own defaults). Defaults to false.

shell.description: Mutual exclusivity: a preset must not carry `shell`.

hook.description: Mutual exclusivity: a preset must not carry `hook`.

repo.description: Asserts installed from a specific repository (keyed by owner/repo). Removable via the /asserts UI.
